description: SkillOpt score schema — defines the composite score for evaluating codegen output quality

compiles.description: All generated Python files are syntactically valid
compiles.method: ast.parse on all .py files, ratio of valid/total

imports_valid.description: All import statements resolve to existing modules
imports_valid.method: AST inspection of Import/ImportFrom nodes, heuristic validation

tests_pass.description: Generated test files contain well-structured test functions
tests_pass.method: Count test_ prefixed functions in test files, ratio of valid/total

endpoints_match.description: Generated API endpoints match expected endpoints list
endpoints_match.method: Jaccard similarity between found and expected endpoint sets

models_match.description: Generated data models match expected model names
models_match.method: Fuzzy match of class names in model/schema files vs expectations

no_orphan_code.description: No orphaned imports, empty functions, or incomplete code
no_orphan_code.method: Count pass-only functions, TODO comments, unused symbols

lint_clean.description: Common lint issues (trailing whitespace, long lines, bare except)
lint_clean.method: Regex checks for common patterns — trailing whitespace, >120 chars, mixed tabs/spaces, bare except
